name: Hasan Khan
title: ML Engineer
base_skills: Machine Learning & AI Technologies: Keras, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Theano, Caffe, MXNet, Fast.ai, Hugging Face Transformers, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, H2O.ai, Statsmodels, TPOT, Auto-sklearn, PyCaret, Scikit-Image, Feature-engine
Natural Language Processing (NLP): NLTK, SpaCy, Gensim, TextBlob, AllenNLP, OpenNLP, Tesseract, Hugging Face Transformers, BERT, GPT, T5, DistilBERT, LIME, SHAP, ELI5, Captum
Deep Learning & Neural Networks: CNN, RNN, LSTM, GANs, VAEs, CycleGAN, Pix2Pix, YOLO, Detectron2, TensorFlow Object Detection API
Reinforcement Learning: Stable-Baselines3, Ray RLLib, OpenAI Gym, TensorFlow Agents
Big Data & Distributed Computing: Apache Spark, Dask, Hadoop, Apache Kafka, Ray, PySpark, BigQuery
Data Science & Analytics: Pandas, NumPy, Vaex, Prophet, ARIMA, fbprophet, t-SNE, UMAP, PCA, LDA, K-means, DBSCAN, Agglomerative Clustering

Model Deployment & MLOps: MLflow, TensorFlow Serving, ONNX, Flask, FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes, Apache Airflow, Luigi, Dagster, Talend, Apache NiFi, Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, Kubeflow, Pachyderm, DVC (Data Version Control), Terraform
Cloud Platforms & Services: AWS (S3, EC2, SageMaker, Lambda), Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform, IBM Watson
Programming Languages: Python, Java, C++, Ada, HTML, JavaScript, SQL
Version Control & Development Tools: Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, Jupyter, PyCharm, Visual Studio Code
Data Visualization: Plotly, Bokeh, Dash, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Altair, ggplot2

experience.title: ML Engineer
base_bullets: Spearheaded the end-to-end design, development, and production deployment of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, enabling automated extraction and retrieval of complex medical claims data while reducing manual processing effort by hundreds of hours each month.

Fine-tuned and optimized large language models (LLMs) on domain-specific healthcare datasets, significantly improving classification accuracy, entity extraction precision, and downstream risk analysis capabilities across multiple operational workflows.

Engineered, curated, and validated high-quality training datasets for LLMs by implementing scalable data labeling methodologies, annotation workflows, and quality assurance processes to ensure robust supervised learning performance in production environments.

Built and deployed API-driven data annotation pipelines and active learning feedback loops, enabling continuous model improvement while reducing manual labeling overhead and accelerating iteration cycles for machine learning systems.

Architected and implemented scalable, fault-tolerant ETL pipelines using Azure Databricks, processing large volumes of structured and unstructured healthcare data to support machine learning training, analytics, and reporting use cases.

Led the migration of legacy data infrastructure and workflows to modern Databricks-based platforms, improving data processing scalability, reducing latency, and enhancing maintainability across enterprise data systems.

Integrated Databricks-based data pipelines with business intelligence and reporting platforms, enabling near real-time visibility into claims processing trends, operational metrics, and model-driven insights for stakeholders.

Designed, developed, and deployed production-grade machine learning systems to automate claims processing workflows, significantly improving decision latency, operational throughput, and overall system reliability in high-volume environments.

Built AI-powered conversational agents and intelligent chatbots to automate data retrieval, form-filling, and user interactions, reducing manual errors while increasing productivity and operational efficiency across claims processing teams.

Applied advanced natural language processing techniques, including transformer-based architectures such as BERT and GPT, to convert unstructured medical text into structured, model-ready representations for downstream machine learning applications.

Implemented reinforcement learning-based optimization strategies to continuously improve decision-making policies in claims handling workflows, enabling adaptive systems that evolve based on real-time operational feedback and performance signals.

Developed and deployed cloud-native machine learning solutions on Microsoft Azure, ensuring scalability, security, and cost efficiency while leveraging managed services for data storage, compute, and model serving.

Built and maintained real-time monitoring dashboards to track model performance, detect data drift, and visualize key operational metrics, enabling proactive intervention and continuous system optimization.

Ensured strict HIPAA compliance across all data pipelines and machine learning systems by implementing encryption, access controls, audit logging, and governance frameworks to protect sensitive healthcare information.

Improved model interpretability and transparency by implementing explainability techniques such as SHAP and LIME, enabling stakeholders to understand, trust, and effectively utilize machine learning predictions in decision-making processes.

Automated model retraining workflows and CI/CD pipelines, enabling continuous integration and delivery of updated machine learning models while reducing manual intervention and improving deployment consistency.

Led troubleshooting and optimization efforts for deployed machine learning systems, proactively identifying and resolving issues such as data drift, performance degradation, and system bottlenecks in production environments.
Established robust model versioning and experiment tracking frameworks using MLflow, ensuring reproducibility, governance, and traceability across the entire machine learning lifecycle.

Collaborated closely with cross-functional stakeholders, including engineering, product, and business teams, to align machine learning solutions with organizational objectives and maximize business impact.

Designed and implemented closed-loop feedback systems that incorporated real-world user interactions and performance data into continuous model improvement pipelines, enhancing system adaptability and accuracy over time.

Defined and led enterprise-wide AI architecture strategy across generative AI, search, recommendation, and agentic AI systems, ensuring alignment with long-term business goals and emerging technology trends.

Delivered advanced Azure-based generative AI and agentic AI solutions using Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Foundry, and related services to enable intelligent automation and decision support across business workflows.
Built autonomous agent-based workflows using LangChain and LangGraph, enabling complex reasoning, planning, and orchestration capabilities across multi-step processes and enterprise systems.
Established and enforced best practices for prompt engineering, model evaluation, monitoring, and responsible AI governance to ensure ethical, effective, and scalable deployment of AI technologies.

experience.title: Data Scientist, Senior Analyst
base_bullets: Developed and deployed advanced natural language processing models using BERT to analyze large-scale employee feedback datasets for NASA, enabling automated sentiment analysis and extraction of actionable insights to improve organizational decision-making.

Built and optimized predictive regression models for the Defense Logistics Agency, improving forecasting accuracy for rare inventory items and enabling more efficient supply chain operations and cost-saving strategies.

Designed and implemented scalable, end-to-end machine learning pipelines that automated data preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation, significantly reducing time-to-deployment and improving system reliability.
Conducted in-depth exploratory data analysis using tools such as Pandas, Matplotlib, and Seaborn to identify trends, correlations, and anomalies that informed strategic and operational improvements.
Deployed machine learning models within AWS cloud environments, ensuring seamless integration with federal IT systems and enabling scalable processing of large and complex datasets.
Improved model performance and robustness through rigorous hyperparameter tuning, cross-validation, and experimentation, resulting in more accurate and reliable predictions across multiple use cases.

Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate machine learning models into production systems, enabling automated workflows and real-time decision-making capabilities within government operations.

Developed and maintained interactive, real-time dashboards using Dash and Shiny, allowing stakeholders to explore key performance indicators and derive actionable insights from machine learning outputs.

Engineered high-performance data pipelines and ETL workflows to ingest, transform, and process large-scale datasets from multiple sources, ensuring data quality, consistency, and availability for downstream applications.
Applied advanced social text mining techniques to extract patterns, sentiment, and behavioral insights from large volumes of textual data, supporting analytics and decision-making initiatives.

Leveraged data visualization and storytelling techniques to communicate complex analytical results effectively to both technical and non-technical stakeholders, improving understanding and adoption of insights.
Utilized cloud computing platforms such as AWS and Azure to scale machine learning and analytics workloads, ensuring high availability and performance for large-scale projects.
Collaborated on continuous model improvement initiatives by incorporating stakeholder feedback and real-world performance data into iterative development and optimization cycles.
Designed and developed dynamic, responsive user interfaces using AngularJS and modern JavaScript frameworks, enhancing user interaction with machine learning systems and analytical tools.
Automated internal workflows and system integrations using Google AppScript, improving operational efficiency, reducing manual effort, and enhancing collaboration across teams.

experience.title: Research Assistant, Meliza Auditory Cognition Lab
base_bullets: Developed computational models of auditory cognition using recursive Bayesian filtering techniques, enabling estimation of biophysical parameters and advancing research in neural signal processing and sensory systems.
Built simulation frameworks in Python to model auditory system responses, contributing to a deeper understanding of neural processing mechanisms and auditory perception in biological systems.
Applied machine learning algorithms to classify auditory neurons based on ion channel composition, providing novel insights into neural behavior and computational neuroscience research.
Designed and executed controlled experiments to validate computational hypotheses, ensuring high-quality data collection and reliable results for downstream modeling and analysis.
Utilized MATLAB extensively for signal processing, statistical analysis, and computational modeling of auditory data, supporting research efforts and improving analytical accuracy.
Developed custom data visualization tools to interpret complex neural datasets, enabling researchers to better understand patterns and refine computational models.
Managed, curated, and maintained large experimental datasets, ensuring data integrity, accessibility, and reproducibility for ongoing and future research initiatives.

education.degree: Bachelor of Arts, Computer Science & Cognitive Science
